title: Delete Property Values
content:
# Delete Property Values

Permanently delete existing property Values. This cannot be undone once the API request has been submitted.

## Endpoint

`POST /properties/{property_name}/values/delete`

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client(api_key="your-api-key")
response = client.properties.deletePropertyValues()
print(response)

parameters.name: property_name
parameters.description: Property `name` for which the values are to be deleted. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.

resources.description: List of resources where the associated `property_name` values will be deleted.
